meanings.definition: deprive of oxygen and prevent from breathing
examples: Othello smothered Desdemona with a pillow
The child suffocated herself with a plastic bag that the parents had left on the floor
the butter cream smothered the cake

meanings.definition: deprive of the oxygen necessary for combustion
causing difficulty in breathing especially through lack of fresh air and presence of heat
examples: the room was suffocating--hot and airless
